name: Dilled Carrots and Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound green beans, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
2. Add the green beans and carrots, cook until tender.
3. Drain the vegetables.
4. In a skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
5. Add the dill, salt, and pepper; stir until fragrant.
6. Toss the cooked vegetables in the skillet with the sauce.
7. Serve hot or at room temperature.
